// about me// über mich

Who I AmWer ich bin

I'm Madusanka Gamage — a creative professional with over 8 years of hands-on experience bringing brands to life in the physical world: illuminated LED signage, large-format print production, precision CNC fabrication, and advertising installations built to exact standards.

In 2024, I expanded that same passion for craftsmanship into AI-powered creative production. Today, I create cinematic AI-generated videos, modern websites, digital branding systems, and rapid app prototypes — combining traditional production knowledge with modern creative technology.

Based in Sri Lanka, I am German A1 certified and currently progressing toward B1 proficiency. My goal is to contribute this unique blend of physical production expertise and AI-driven creativity to a forward-thinking team in Germany or across the EU.

I don't just create visuals. I create solutions that are designed to work in the real world..

Ich bin Madusanka Gamage — ein kreativer Profi mit über 8 Jahren Erfahrung in der Markenwelt: leuchtende LED-Schilder auf Ladenfronten, Großformatdrucke, die Wände in Aussagen verwandeln, und präzise CNC-Arbeiten, die Perfektion bis auf den Millimeter erfordern.

2024 habe ich dieselbe Qualitätsbesessenheit auf KI übertragen. Jetzt produziere ich sendefähige Videos ohne Kamera, baue vollanimierte Websites in Stunden und entwickle Mobile-App-Prototypen aus einem Brief. Die Werkzeuge haben sich geändert. Die Maßstäbe nicht.

Ich lebe in Sri Lanka, bin Deutsch A1 zertifiziert und strebe aktiv B2 an. Mein Ziel ist es, diese seltene Kombination aus handwerklicher Meisterschaft und KI-gestützter Produktion in ein kreatives Team in Deutschland oder der EU einzubringen — und vom ersten Tag an beizutragen.

Ich lasse Dinge nicht nur gut aussehen. Ich lasse Dinge funktionieren.

// new capabilities

AI-Powered Output

Traditional craft meets cutting-edge AI. I now deliver professional videos, modern websites, and mobile applications — entirely AI-assisted. Fast turnaround, production-ready quality, one point of contact.

01
AI Video

Broadcast-Quality
Video — No Camera

Product promos, brand films, social reels, animated explainers — all generated with AI tools like Runway, Kling and HeyGen. Scripted, edited, and delivered ready for YouTube, Instagram or TV display.

AI Web

Modern Websites
Built in Hours

Fully animated, responsive websites and landing pages — built using AI coding tools. Suitable for businesses, events, portfolios and product launches. Deployed live, SEO-ready, mobile-optimised.

AI Mobile

App Prototypes
to Live Products

From wireframe to App Store — mobile apps designed and built with AI-assisted platforms. iOS and Android ready. Ideal for SMEs in Germany needing a digital product without a full dev team.

Why hire me in Germany?

One Creative. Full-Stack Output. EU-Ready.

German businesses value precision, reliability, and Eigeninitiative — I bring all three, plus 8 years of proven delivery across print, signage, and now AI media. I am efficient, detail-oriented, and able to produce the work of a full creative team independently. A1 German certified. B2 in progress. Available immediately upon visa approval.
